diff:
diff --git a/src/pathjoin.py b/src/pathjoin.py
index 1e2ffc2..c9a20e7 100644
--- a/src/pathjoin.py
+++ b/src/pathjoin.py
@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
 def join_segments(segments):
-    cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
-    return "/".join(cleaned)
+    if not segments:
+        return ""
+    if segments[0] == "":
+        cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments[1:] if segment]
+        return "/" + "/".join(cleaned)
+    else:
+        cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
+        return "/".join(cleaned)
